title: phyllanthus saxosus
intro: Phyllanthus saxosus, also known as the rock Phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus saxosus include its potential to protect against liver damage, improve immune function, and exhibit anti-viral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
